sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_bitmaps (id Int32, bitmap_col ClickHouse.Bitmap) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_bitmaps (id, bitmap_col) VALUES (1, bitmapBuild([1, 2, 3])), (2, bitmapBuild([3, 4, 5]));
SELECT bitmapAndCardinality(bitmap_col, bitmapBuild([1, 3])) AS res FROM test_bitmaps WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_bitmaps SET bitmap_col = bitmapBuild([1, 3, 5]) WHERE id = 2;
SELECT bitmapAndCardinality(bitmap_col, (SELECT bitmapBuild([2, 4, 6]) FROM test_bitmaps WHERE id = 1)) AS combined_res FROM test_bitmaps;
